meta.homeTitle: Sans Souci Ongles & Spa — Manicure & Pedicure in Laval
meta.homeDescription: Manicure, pedicure, lash extensions and waxing at CF Carrefour Laval. 20+ years of expertise.
meta.aboutTitle: Why Choose Us — Sans Souci Ongles & Spa
meta.appointmentsTitle: Book Today — Sans Souci Ongles & Spa

hero.alt: Sans Souci Ongles & Spa salon interior

home.story: With over 20 years of experience in nail artistry, our friendly, professional team delivers the best nail care in Laval. Your satisfaction is guaranteed — and every client is part of our family.
home.contactIntro: Questions or ready to book? Send us a message and we'll reply shortly.

services.title: Manicure
services.body: We use premium products with over 1,000 gel colours to cover every need — nail extensions, nail care and spa treatments — blending luxury and creativity for the look you want.

services.title: Pedicure
services.body: The ultimate spa pedicure: nail shaping, cuticle care, gentle exfoliation, a relaxing massage and deep hydration for soft, rejuvenated feet. Add a paraffin treatment for extra relaxation.

services.title: Lash Extensions
services.body: A range of lash extensions — 2D, 3D and Hybrid styles — tailored to you for a natural look that enhances your beauty.

services.title: Waxing
services.body: Our waxing technique keeps you comfortable for a pain-free experience — from eyebrows to a full bikini wax, we've got you covered.

servicesPage.heading: Our Services
servicesPage.intro: Premium products, over 1,000 gel colours and 20+ years of expertise.

about.heading: Why Choose Us
body: Because we make your safety and hygiene our priority. At Sans Souci Ongles & Spa we take your health seriously: we keep three sanitation stations stocked with disinfectant, tools are sterilized after every use, and our manicure stations have dust collectors that protect both clients and staff.

Because we offer professional, exceptional service. With over 20 years of experience in nail care and beauty, our welcoming, professional technicians know how to deliver the high-quality results you're looking for, with satisfaction guaranteed.
Because at Sans Souci Ongles & Spa, you are family. Our team's warm welcome makes you feel right at home — every client is part of our extended family.

appointments.heading: Book Today
appointments.intro: Book online in seconds — pick your service and time, and we'll take care of the rest.
appointments.body: Booking opens in our secure online scheduler. Choose your service and a time that works for you.

contact.heading: Contact Us
contact.intro: Find us at CF Carrefour Laval. Questions? Send us a message.

form.success: Thank you — we've received your message and will be in touch shortly.
